g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Next.js build phase')
g.text: Next.js 15 + React Three Fiber + GSAP + Lenis · 2–3 weeks

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does domain and hosting setup involve?')
g.text: Vercel deploy · Custom domain · Contact form via Resend · 1 day

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What SEO and meta work does the site need?')
g.text: Meta tags · OpenGraph image · Schema markup · Sitemap · 1–2 days

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What performance testing should I run before launch?')
g.text: Lighthouse 95+ desktop · 85+ mobile · Core Web Vitals · Half a day

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does launch day look like for this site?')
g.text: Flip DNS · Announce on LinkedIn · Share with warm contacts · Day 1

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What content should I add to the portfolio after launch?')
g.text: Case studies · Alchemetryx blog feed · Testimonials · Ongoing

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What optional enhancements can I add to the portfolio later?')
g.text: GSAP SplitText hero · Three.js depth effects · Password-protected case studies
